home.predictMatchesDesc: View all matches and submit your predictions
home.myGroupsDesc: Create or join groups to compete with friends
home.step1: Predict the exact score for each match
home.step2: Use up to 3 Jokers (×2) on your best guesses
home.step3: Compete with friends in private groups

rules.title: How to Play
rules.intro: Predict the exact score for each World Cup match and compete with friends in private groups.
rules.rule1: Predict the final score for each match (after extra time in knockouts).
rules.rule2: Predictions lock at kickoff — you can't change them after.
rules.rule3: Use up to 3 Jokers per tournament to double your points on your best guesses.
rules.rule4: In knockout matches, if you predict a draw, also pick who wins on penalties.
rules.tournamentDesc: Before the tournament starts, predict the Champion, Runner-up, Top Scorer, and Top Assister. Awards are added to your total at the end of the tournament.
rules.outrightChampion: World Champion — you predicted the eventual winner
rules.outrightRunnerup: Runner-up — you predicted the team that loses the final
rules.outrightScorer: Top Scorer — you predicted the leading goal-scorer
rules.outrightAssister: Top Assister — you predicted the leading assists provider
rules.leaguesDesc: Create a group, share the invite code with friends, and compete on a private leaderboard.

profile.title: Profile
profile.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters

onboarding.stepGroupDesc: Create or join a group to compete with friends
onboarding.stepChampionDesc: Choose who you think will win the World Cup
onboarding.stepScorerDesc: Predict who will be the tournament's top scorer
